subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Names have prevented the servants from their Lord and Creator, and in the pool of appellations have they been drowned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اسما عباد را از مالک و خالق آن منع نموده در غدیر اسم غرق شده اند
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
